rulings.Case Title: REBECCA NESTLE ET AL VS. ELIZABETH COURT, LP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Complaint In Intervention
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 12, 2017, line 1. CROSS DEFENDANTS BONNIE DONG, MICHAEL GILPIN'S Motion To Dismiss Complaint In Intervention. GRANTED with leave to amend for the Cross-Complaint to join its insured, a necessary party, as a Cross-Complainant or as a Cross-Defendant. Cross-Complaint shall have 20 days to file an Amended Cross-Complaint and to serve it promptly thereafter. Opposing party failed to cite any authority for the proposition that joining the insured, a necessary party, under the circumstances, would not comport with the policy for "fairness, convenience and practicability" to such an extent that it would outweigh the policy for "complete determination and avoidance of multiplicity of lawsuits." See Peerless Ins. v. Sup. Ct. (1970) 6 Cal.App.3d 358 and Phillips v. Western Pac. R. Co. (1971) 22 Cal.App.3d 441. Prevailing party prepare order. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1275 BAY STREET PROPERTIES, LLC, VS. THE WILLIAM MCKINLEY BUILDING, LLC, ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 12, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANTS THE WILLIAM MCKINLEY BUILDING, LLC,, SHARON MANNING'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is denied as to items 1-7 (See Notice of Motion and Motion to Strike Portions of Complaint). Moving party failed to sustain its burden to show that these allegations are false, improper, irrelevant, or not drawn with conformity with the laws. Motion is GRANTED with leave to amend at to item 8 (See Notice of Motion and Motion to Strike Portions of Complaint) for plaintiff to allege facts showing that these damages are "additional damages" within the meaning of CC 3334 and to allege causation. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL KELLY ET AL VS. MATTHEW C. DIRKES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Costs
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 12, 2017, line 3. PLAINTIFFS PAUL KELLY, DANIELLE PHILLIPS' Motion To Strike Costs. GRANTED. $144 of claimed costs is taxed. Defendant shall recover $333.90. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: REZA MOINI NAZERI VS. ALI MOINI NAZERI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 12, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANTS ALI NAZERI, AKBAR NAZERI'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address all issues raised by demurrer in good faith and to allege facts showing Plaintiff's claim to the Property and to allege facts showing that the claims are not barred by the statute of limitations. All parties are ordered to comply with SFLR, CRC and CCP in future. Failure to comply will not be tolerated in future and may result in motions being taken off calendar or denied. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHOO KOON NG VS. DAMIEN QUINN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 12, 2017, line 5. DEFENDANT DAMIEN QUINN'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint is not barred by the statute of limitations or res judicata. =(501/REQ)
